title: 10 best herbal essential oils for baldness
description: Dandelion essential oils helps with baldness because it promotes healthy hair growth by stimulating blood circulation to the scalp, which increases oxygen delivery and nutrient supply to the hair follicles. The oil's antioxidant properties also help to reduce inflammation and prevent oxidative stress, common causes of hair loss.
